MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHUI LING TAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: XXXXXXXX; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CASILLAS, PEDRO PEDROZA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PEDRO PEDROZA CASILLAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC. IS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. THE COURT DETERMINED THE PLAINTIFF SUED THE WRONG DEFENDANT AS J.P. MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVIES, INC. IS NOT THE PROPER PARTY TO THIS ACTION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
